title: arthraxon hispidus subsp. langsdorffii
intro: Arthraxon hispidus subsp. langsdorffii, also known as Langsdorff's bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Langsdorff's bentgrass include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve pain and fever, and support the immune system. Langsdorff's bentgrass can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
